references.role: global Licorn kitchen identity across all segments
references.prompt: Preserve island materials, lighting, and spatial context; allow macro crops that still feel like the same kitchen.

references.role: overhead workstation framing for saucing, rolling, toppings, and hero lifts
references.prompt: Use for top-down food actions; keep hands readable and consistent with PoseTopDown when both appear.

references.role: cooktop close context for sauce simmer and sauté beats
references.prompt: Anchor pan bottom heat reads and reflections; avoid readable digital text on controls.

references.role: occasional medium safety stitch for saucepan context
references.prompt: Single controlled wide if macro clarity fails; still no readable UI.

references.role: oven doorway staging for tray movement
references.prompt: Use for insert motion continuity; keep rack geometry consistent with Licorn oven reference.

references.role: interior macro for melt hints, blister reveal, edge toast, steam
references.prompt: Glass reflections acceptable; avoid inventing extra racks or UI.

references.role: large saucepan silhouette for sauce and sauté
references.prompt: Match handle angle and scale with Licorn asset; keep interior food reads dominant.

references.role: whisk identity for sauce surface agitation
references.prompt: Thin tines; no substitution with random fork unless prompt omits whisk beat.

references.role: folding and serving tool for filling and lift shots
references.prompt: Flexible blade read for toss and lift; avoid spatulas with brand marks.

references.role: back-of-spoon sauce spread and optional cream drag
references.prompt: Rounded bowl silhouette for saucing strokes.
Mesh and rim shape only; beans should look rinsed with occasional water bead.

references.role: Licorn character identity for any visible performer
references.prompt: Do not redesign face or outfit; pair with listed pose references for hands and body.

references.role: top-down hand discipline for overhead food work
references.prompt: Align wrist angles with overhead shots; avoid extra disembodied hands.
Quiet pride body language; tray or casserole visible at chest height.

references.role: fragile sauce skin: chili-red shimmer, controlled bubbles, minimal chunk read
references.prompt: Generate gpt_image_2 reference: overhead or slight angle macro of Tex-Mex red enchilada sauce actively simmering in a stainless saucepan, glossy oil film, sparse spice specks, no tomato pulp cubes, warm tungsten Licorn-like kitchen reflections, no text.

references.role: unbaked parallel roll geometry packed in rectangular ceramic before oven
references.prompt: Generate gpt_image_2 reference: 9x13 greased casserole with parallel large flour tortillas rolled seam-down, valleys filled with pooled red sauce, snowy shredded cheese unevenly topping, tortilla faces still pale—not blistered.

references.role: post-bake blister cheese and reduced sauce channels
references.prompt: Generate gpt_image_2 reference: baked Tex-Mex chicken enchiladas same layout as pre-bake, blistered browned cheese highs, mahogany sauce edges between rolls, parallel rolls still recognizable, restrained steam wisps.

references.role: cut bite with modest REALISTIC cheese threads and visible strata
references.prompt: Generate gpt_image_2 reference: fork lifting a cut section of baked enchilada showing chicken, beans, melted cheese strata, restrained short cheese pull arcs—avoid rubber band stretch, no text.
